 • Other open or complex wounds that require treatment that can only be provided 
safely and effectively by a licensed nurse. 

EXAMPLE 1: 

A patient has a second-degree burn with full thickness skin damage on the back. The 
wound is cleansed, followed by an application of Sulfamylon. While the wound requires
